discussion_comments.comment_body:
**I think this is actually something that is broken outside of tests** because your tests set `githubLocation` to `https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/` (which has a path of `"freeCodeCamp/"`) while your actual configuration sets `GITHUB_LOCATION` to `https://github.com/freeCodeCamp`, which has a path of `"freeCodeCamp"`.

When the code is running using the environment configuration, it will your code will generate links in the format `https://github.com/freeCodeCampfreeCodeCamp/...`, which will not work.

Please fix this. But also please **make sure you run the code locally and confirm the feature works and generates the expected links** rather than just assuming that the tests have you covered. :-)

Personally, I like to see short videos/screencasts of a feature like this as part of the PR, as that gives me a chance to see how everything renders and be confident it has been tested.

It's actually a case where I updated my .env file and forgot to update the sample. But thank you for pointing this out. 

Regardless the point you made still stands.

discussion_comments.comment_body:
The exam-token settings are purely aesthetical because it did not account for the consistent gaps with spacers.

For the classroom setting, I thin the `IfFeatureEnabled` is a better choice. It's simple to understand.
